title: Grevosea 2PCS Mini Short Screwdriver Set - Stubby Screwdriver for Tight Spaces, One Flat Head and One Phillips for Sewing Machine Repair
features: PACKAGE QUANTITY: sewing machine screwdriver set includes 1Pcs red phillips head screwdriver and 1Pcs green flat head screwdriver. Clear Plastic Handles, these two colors are easy to identify, which make your work more and more convenient
MINI SIZE: the flat head width is 1/4 inch; Phillips size PH2. Mini short screwdriver was designed specifically for sewing machines, transparent non-slip handle,strong and sturdy

QUALITY MATERIAL: the transparent plastic handles of mini screwdriver are made of PVC material; transparent handle is comfortable to grip. Mini short handle screwdrivers are made of steel, lightweight design makes it easy to carry and use

DELICATE MECHANISM: The short screwdriver have short easy-to-grip 6-slot handle and is suitable for tight spaces. Finger recess in handle end allows constant finger pressure while turning. Short handle makes it easy to get the extra torque you need

WIDE APPLICATION: stubby screwdriver not only suitable for sewing machines, toys, electronic products, small furniture, but for construction site, school, office and other narrow places where you want to repair
description: Features: Quality Material: The transparent plastic handles of mini screwdriver are made of PVC material; Handle surface is very smooth,oil resistant and easy to wipe off. handles Crystal grip lever anti-slip groove are easy to grip. Suitable for Many Spaces: Perfect for repairing or servicing electronics, sewing machines, and small appliances, for use on furniture installation, machine repair, or TV background other tight spaces.
